name: RenewContract
description: Existing customer whose contract is ending, has ended, or is approaching its end date wants to discuss renewal options, sign a new deal, or understand what happens next — they are open to staying with Virgin Media and want to explore their options.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want to renew my contract
What are my renewal options?
My contract is ending soon and I'd like to discuss renewing
How do I renew my broadband contract?
I'm coming to the end of my contract — what can you offer me?
My contract has expired and I want to sign a new one
I'd like to discuss a new contract before my current one runs out
What happens when my contract ends?
I'm out of contract — what are my options for staying?
Can I get a new deal when my contract finishes?
I want to re-sign with Virgin Media
My contract is up for renewal
I received a letter saying my contract is ending — what do I do?
Discuss my renewal please
I want to see what renewal deals are available for my account
My current deal has ended and I want to agree a new one
I don't want to go onto the rolling contract — what packages can I renew to?
Can I extend my current contract?
I'd like to commit to a new term with you
What do you offer existing customers who are renewing?
My contract runs out next month — can we sort a new one?
renew my contract
